spec_match.rationale: Resolves an if() chain across three condition kinds, visualising short-circuit evaluation and the chosen arm — accurate to the spec.

interactive.rationale: Three selects + one input drive the resolver and paint a live target.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a tweak-environment-and-watch resolver; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Missing: parse error display, chain longer than 5 arms, custom property cycle detection.

design_system.rationale: Mostly variables; default colours `#7fb3ff` and `#000000` in JS state are content (user-pickable) so acceptable. No structural design system regression.

openQuestions.title: Surface parse errors
openQuestions.detail: An if() with mismatched parentheses or unknown condition kind silently fails. Add an error panel that catches CSSOM exceptions and explains the parse failure.

openQuestions.title: Detect cycles in custom-property references
openQuestions.detail: Custom-property cycles produce an invalid value. Add a button that intentionally creates a cycle so authors see the resolver bail out.

summary: Strong evaluation visualiser; parse-error and cycle cases would round it out.
